## Description
A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Go to '...'
2. Click '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Screenshots
If applicable, add screenshots.

## Environment
- Browser: [e.g. Chrome 120]
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11]
- Screen reader (if accessibility-related): [e.g. NVDA, JAWS]
